case_title: HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA VS. MARGUERITE M. KUHN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-20-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT KUHN, MARGUERITE M. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-30-2012
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT KUHN, MARGUERITE M.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUHN, MARGUERITE M. $7,395.68 PRINCIPAL, $1,325.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $339.50 COSTS, $245.00 STIPULATION FEE AND FIRST APPEARANCE FEE, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,305.18, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-20-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA SERVED OCT-18-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KUHN, MARGUERITE M.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF CASE MANAGEMENT ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA
